Pricing

Pricing that's so simple. Contact us for more details

FAQ

Common questions

Why wouldn't I just hire a full-time designer? +
Good question! Hiring a full-time senior designer costs $80,000+ per year, plus benefits. With Prexora, you get on-demand design work at a fraction of the cost, with no long-term commitments.
How fast will I receive my designs? +
On average, most requests are completed in just 2 business days or less. Complex projects may take longer, but we'll always keep you in the loop.
Who are the designers? +
You'll be working with our handpicked team of experienced designers with years of expertise across branding, web design, and digital marketing.
What if I don't like the design? +
No worries! We offer unlimited revisions until you're completely satisfied. Your happiness is our priority.
Are there any refunds if I don't like the service? +
Due to the nature of the work we do, we do not offer refunds. However, we will work with you until you are 100% satisfied with our service.
